info.title: Dumpling - .NET Memory Dump Analyzer
info.description: A delightful CLI tool for analyzing .NET memory dumps (.gcdump files). Provides heap analysis, type statistics, retained size calculations, object inspection, and memory leak detection with both command-line and interactive modes.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: 🥟 Dumpling - A delightful CLI tool for analyzing .NET memory dumps

arguments.name: file
arguments.description: Path to the .gcdump file to analyze

commands.name: compare
commands.description: Compare multiple heap dump files to identify changes and memory growth

arguments.name: files
arguments.description: Paths to .gcdump files to compare (2 or more), or a directory containing dump files
